hero.name: Alexey Lensu
hero.role: Python developer. I build Telegram bots for sales, backends for products, automation for business.

services.title: What I do
services.subtitle: Code that solves business problems. No fluff.

items.title: Telegram Bots
items.desc: Bots for lead capture, qualification, and auto-funnels. aiogram 3, FSM, middleware. CRM and payment integration. A working bot in two weeks.

items.title: Backend
items.desc: APIs on FastAPI, PostgreSQL databases. Async queue processing, background tasks. Containerized and deployed to your server. Code that handles load.

items.title: Automation
items.desc: Web scraping, document OCR, API sync between services. I remove manual work from repetitive processes. You get hours back in your day.

items.title: Web Applications
items.desc: From landing pages to Telegram Mini Apps with backend logic. React on the front, FastAPI on the back. Admin panels, dashboards, client portals.

items.title: AI CFO Bot
items.desc: Telegram bot for small business finance. Users type expenses in plain text. AI parses entries, categorizes them, builds daily, weekly, monthly reports. Debt tracking, Excel export.

items.title: RuKond
items.desc: Website for an HVAC installation company. Equipment catalog, three request types with validation, admin panel. React, FastAPI, Tailwind CSS. Deployed via Docker Compose on Cloudpub.

items.title: SE Toolkit Hackathon
items.desc: SingularityApp integration with a Telegram bot. Users write tasks in chat, LLM parses them, bot confirms and creates the task in the tracker. FastAPI, PostgreSQL, OpenRouter.

items.title: Lead Bot
items.desc: Async bot for lead capture and management. State machine on FSM, data access through DAO, anti-flood protection, admin panel. PostgreSQL, Docker Compose.

items.title: Fyukon Automation Lab
items.desc: Interactive automation demo platform. Three business niches, lead form, CRM with Kanban board. AI assistant on DeepSeek, Telegram bot, cost calculator. React, FastAPI, Caddy.

items.title: TableCRM
items.desc: Production work on tablecrm.com. Added MAX registration, changed database schema, set up GitLab CI/CD. Navigated architecture and built features without rewrites.

experience.title: Experience
experience.subtitle: Two years in development. 300+ lessons taught. Code in production.

items.title: Programming Teacher

items.desc: Taught 300+ lessons in Python, C++, ML. 12 students aged 13-16. 20 hours per week.

items.title: Teacher

items.title: Consultant
